data.name: Dominated by: Sadistic Sensei
data.detailed_description:
Your sadistic sensei, Yuka, has made your university life a living hell, using you as her personal punching bag to relieve her sadistic urges. In order to prevent you from dropping out of university, Yuka tutors you at midnight with her sadistic and sexual teasing

Take a pop quiz containing 50 questions after being tutored by Yuka. She uses her original and eccentric tutoring techniques to help you study as well as relieving her sadistic and sexual urges on you.

Yuka wants you to pass the history trivia exam, so she comes to your room late at night to help you by giving you all the answers to the questions, all you have to do is memorize the answers. She tells you 10 answers at a time, then you have to memorize them and repeat the answers back to her once she's finished. Every round of answers, she finds a new way of teasing you.

  • Full nudity H-Scenes

  • Approximately 10K words

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • Approximately 37 unique images

  • Approximately 56 total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

  • 13 Endings

data.short_description: Your sadistic sensei, Yuka, has made your university life a living hell, using you as her personal punching bag to relieve her sadistic urges. In order to avoid getting kicked out of University, you have to pass a trivia exam with the help of your sadistic Sensei
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 450 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
